name: Awe & Wonder
description: Marvel at creation and the signs of Allah in the universe

prompts.text: Allah begins by saying He taught the Quran. What has the Quran taught you that nothing else could?
Which of your Lord's favours would you deny? Pause and name three you've experienced today.
The sun, moon, stars, and plants all submit to Allah. What does 'submission' look like for you?
Allah challenges you to look for any flaw in creation. When you look at the sky or nature, what amazes you most?
Your vision will return 'humbled and exhausted' after searching for imperfection. What does this teach you about perfectionism in your own life?
The earth is described as a bed, mountains as pegs, and the night as a covering. Which of these images speaks to you most — and why?
Sleep is called a 'rest' and the day is for livelihood. How intentionally do you use your mornings?
Rain is sent from clouds to bring forth grain and vegetation. What spiritual 'rain' has revived something in your life recently?
